name: Food & Grocery
heroLead: From snacks and coffee to spices and frozen meals — packaging that keeps product fresh for months and looks sharp on a crowded shelf.

features.label: Degassing valve
features.desc: One-way valve lets fresh-roasted coffee breathe.

features.label: 8-colour print
features.desc: Rotogravure — matte, gloss or metallic finish.

features.label: Bottom gusset
features.desc: Expands when filled — stands square on shelf.

intro: From snacks and coffee to spices and frozen meals, food brands need packaging that keeps product fresh for months and looks sharp on a crowded shelf. We build high-barrier, food-safe structures and print them in deep, repeatable rotogravure colour.
metaDescription: Food-grade flexible packaging for snacks, coffee, tea, spices and frozen foods — high-barrier metallised films, food-safe inner seals, rotogravure print. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: High-barrier metallised film with a food-safe inner seal; degassing valves for coffee.

name: Beverages
heroLead: Juices, sauces and energy gels in welded spout pouches — leak-proof, burst-tested, ambient or chilled.
intro: Liquid brands are moving from bottles to pouches for lighter freight and a better shelf story. Our welded spout pouches and burst-tested seals carry juices, sauces and energy gels leak-free, ambient or chilled.
metaDescription: Flexible packaging for beverages — leak-proof spout pouches for juice, sauces and energy gels, plus bag-in-box liners. Burst-tested seals, rotogravure print. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: Leak-proof welded spout, burst-strength tested seals, high-barrier liquid structures.

name: Pharmaceuticals
heroLead: Dosing sachets, blister foils and sterile formats — high-barrier, hygienic and documented batch by batch.
intro: Pharma packaging is judged on barrier, hygiene and documentation. We run dosing sachets, blister-grade foils and sterile formats in a climate-controlled, dust-free plant, with ASTM-tested batches documented at dispatch.
metaDescription: Pharmaceutical flexible packaging — dosing sachets, ORS, blister foil and sterile formats. Climate-controlled plant, ISO 9001:2015, ASTM-tested batches. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: High-barrier foil laminates, tamper-evident seals, full batch documentation.

name: Personal Care
heroLead: Creams, serums, shampoos and masks in premium matte and metallic finishes, with spot-gloss and window options.
intro: Beauty and personal-care brands need packaging that reads premium and protects delicate formulations. We print creams, serums, shampoos and masks in matte and metallic finishes with spot-gloss and window options.
metaDescription: Personal-care flexible packaging for shampoo sachets, creams, serums and face masks — premium matte and metallic finishes, spot gloss. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: Premium finishes — matte, metallic, spot gloss and registered window cut-outs.

name: Agrochemical
heroLead: Seeds, fertilizers and crop-protection in UV-stable, high-barrier packs with tough seals for the field.
intro: Seeds, fertilizers and crop-protection products need UV protection, moisture barrier and tough seals that survive rough handling in the field. We build durable, high-barrier structures with clear regulatory print.
metaDescription: Agrochemical flexible packaging for seeds, fertilizer and pesticides — UV protection, moisture barrier, rugged seals. Rotogravure printed. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: UV-protective, high-barrier laminates with reinforced seals for field handling.

name: Household Essentials
heroLead: Detergents, cleaners and refills in lightweight, resealable pouches that cut plastic and freight.
intro: Detergents, cleaners and refills are shifting to flexible packs that cut plastic and freight. We build lightweight refill formats and durable resealable pouches that stand up to powders and liquids alike.
metaDescription: Household flexible packaging for detergents, cleaners and refill packs — lightweight refill formats, durable resealable pouches. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: Durable multilayer films, resealable zippers and leak-proof liquid structures.

name: Industrial
heroLead: Lubricants, chemicals and powders in rugged multilayer films and printed roll stock, built for the load.
intro: Industrial products — lubricants, specialty chemicals and powders — demand rugged films and reliable seals in tough supply chains. We supply durable multilayer pouches and printed film rolls built for the load.
metaDescription: Industrial flexible packaging for lubricants, chemicals and powders — rugged multilayer films, reliable seals, printed roll stock. Made in Bharuch, Gujarat.
build: Rugged multilayer films and printed roll stock engineered for heavy, demanding use.
